question_en: If 30% of a number is 45, what is the number?
question_hi: यदि किसी संख्या का 30% 45 है, तो संख्या क्या है?
explanation_en: Let the number be x. Then 30% of x = 45 => 0.3x = 45 => x = 45/0.3 = 150.
explanation_hinglish: Maano number x hai. Toh x ka 30% = 45 => 0.3x = 45 => x = 45/0.3 = 150.
common_mistake_note: Students often forget to divide by 100 when converting percentage to decimal.

question_en: A shopkeeper sells an item at 20% profit. If the cost price is ₹500, what is the selling price?
question_hi: एक दुकानदार 20% लाभ पर एक वस्तु बेचता है। यदि क्रय मूल्य ₹500 है, तो विक्रय मूल्य क्या है?
explanation_en: Selling Price = Cost Price + Profit = 500 + (20% of 500) = 500 + 100 = ₹600.
explanation_hinglish: Selling Price = Cost Price + Profit = 500 + (500 ka 20%) = 500 + 100 = ₹600.
common_mistake_note: Students sometimes calculate profit on selling price instead of cost price.

shortcut_formula_note: Isolate the variable by performing inverse operations on both sides.
common_mistake_note: Students often forget to subtract 5 from both sides of the equation.

question_en: What are the roots of the quadratic equation x² - 5x + 6 = 0?
question_hi: द्विघात समीकरण x² - 5x + 6 = 0 के मूल क्या हैं?
shortcut_formula_note: For ax² + bx + c = 0, sum of roots = -b/a, product = c/a
common_mistake_note: Students often forget to change signs when moving terms across the equation.

question_en: A is the father of B. B is the sister of C. C is the mother of D. How is A related to D?
question_hi: A, B का पिता है। B, C की बहन है। C, D की माता है। A, D से कैसे संबंधित है?
explanation_en: A is father of B and C. C is mother of D. So A is the grandfather of D.
explanation_hi: A, B और C का पिता है। C, D की माता है। तो A, D का दादा है।
explanation_hinglish: A, B aur C ka father hai. C, D ki mother hai. Toh A, D ka grandfather hai.
shortcut_formula_note: Draw a family tree: connect generations vertically to trace relationships.
common_mistake_note: Students sometimes miss that B and C are siblings, making both children of A.

question_en: All cats are mammals. Some mammals are dogs. Therefore:
question_hi: सभी बिल्लियाँ स्तनधारी हैं। कुछ स्तनधारी कुत्ते हैं। इसलिए:
options_hi: कोई निष्कर्ष नहीं निकाला जा सकता
explanation_en: From 'All cats are mammals' and 'Some mammals are dogs', there is no direct relationship established between cats and dogs. No definite conclusion can be drawn.
explanation_hi: 'सभी बिल्लियाँ स्तनधारी हैं' और 'कुछ स्तनधारी कुत्ते हैं' से, बिल्लियों और कुत्तों के बीच कोई सीधा संबंध स्थापित नहीं होता। कोई निश्चित निष्कर्ष नहीं निकाला जा सकता।
explanation_hinglish: 'All cats mammals hain' aur 'Some mammals dogs hain' se, cats aur dogs ke beech koi direct relationship establish nahi hota. Koi definite conclusion nahi nikala ja sakta.
shortcut_formula_note: In syllogisms, 'All A are B' and 'Some B are C' does NOT imply any relationship between A and C.
common_mistake_note: Students incorrectly assume that if some B are C, then some A must be C.

question_en: What comes next in the series: 2, 6, 12, 20, ?
shortcut_formula_note: Look for multiplication patterns: n×(n+1) or n²+n
common_mistake_note: Students sometimes see the difference pattern (4, 6, 8...) and extend it correctly but pick the wrong term.

question_en: Choose the correct form: She ___ to the market every Sunday.
question_hi: सही रूप चुनें: वह हर रविवार ___ बाजार जाती है।
explanation_en: With third person singular subject (She), the simple present tense takes 'goes'.
explanation_hi: तीसरे व्यक्ति एकवचन कर्ता (She) के साथ, सामान्य वर्तमान काल में 'goes' का प्रयोग होता है।
explanation_hinglish: Third person singular subject (She) ke saath, simple present tense mein 'goes' use hota hai.
shortcut_formula_note: He/She/It + Verb(s/es) in simple present tense
common_mistake_note: Students often forget to add 'es' to verbs ending in 'o', 's', 'x', 'ch', 'sh'.

explanation_en: Benevolent means well-meaning, kindly, or generous. 'Kind' is the closest synonym among the options.
explanation_hi: Benevolent का अर्थ है शुभचिंतक, दयालु या उदार। विकल्पों में 'Kind' (दयालु) सबसे निकटतम पर्यायवाची है।
explanation_hinglish: Benevolent ka matlab hota hai well-meaning, kindly ya generous. Options mein 'Kind' sabse closest synonym hai.
common_mistake_note: Students confuse 'benevolent' with 'malevolent' which means wishing harm.

question_en: What does the idiom 'Hit the nail on the head' mean?
question_hi: मुहावरे 'Hit the nail on the head' का क्या अर्थ है?
options_en: To describe exactly what is causing a situation
options_hi: किसी स्थिति का कारण सटीक रूप से बताना
explanation_en: 'Hit the nail on the head' means to describe exactly the right explanation or solution for a situation.
explanation_hi: 'Hit the nail on the head' का अर्थ है किसी स्थिति के लिए सटीक स्पष्टीकरण या समाधान देना।
explanation_hinglish: 'Hit the nail on the head' ka matlab hai kisi situation ke liye exactly sahi explanation ya solution dena.
common_mistake_note: Students interpret this literally (hitting a nail) instead of understanding the figurative meaning.

question_en: Who was the first Prime Minister of India?
question_hi: भारत के पहले प्रधानमंत्री कौन थे?
explanation_en: Jawaharlal Nehru became India's first Prime Minister on August 15, 1947, and served until his death in May 1964.
explanation_hi: जवाहरलाल नेहरू 15 अगस्त 1947 को भारत के पहले प्रधानमंत्री बने और मई 1964 में अपनी मृत्यु तक कार्यरत रहे।
explanation_hinglish: Jawaharlal Nehru 15 August 1947 ko India ke pehle Prime Minister bane aur May 1964 mein apni death tak serve kiya.
shortcut_formula_note: Remember: Nehru = First PM, Patel = First Home Minister, Ambedkar = Chief drafter of Constitution
common_mistake_note: Students confuse Sardar Patel (first Home Minister) with Nehru (first PM).

question_en: Which river is known as the 'Sorrow of Bengal'?
question_hi: किस नदी को 'बंगाल का शोक' कहा जाता है?
explanation_en: Damodar river is called the 'Sorrow of Bengal' because it used to cause frequent devastating floods in West Bengal before the DVC dams were built.
explanation_hi: दामोदर नदी को 'बंगाल का शोक' कहा जाता है क्योंकि DVC बांधों के निर्माण से पहले यह पश्चिम बंगाल में बार-बार विनाशकारी बाढ़ का कारण बनती थी।
explanation_hinglish: Damodar nadi ko 'Bengal ka Shok' kehte hain kyunki DVC dams se pehle ye West Bengal mein baar baar devastating floods laati thi.
shortcut_formula_note: River nicknames: Damodar=Sorrow of Bengal, Kosi=Sorrow of Bihar, Mahanadi=Sorrow of Odisha
common_mistake_note: Students confuse Damodar (Bengal) with Kosi (Bihar), both associated with floods.

question_en: The Constitution of India came into effect on:
question_hi: भारत का संविधान किस तारीख को लागू हुआ?
explanation_en: The Constitution of India was adopted on November 26, 1949 (Constitution Day) but came into effect on January 26, 1950 (Republic Day).
explanation_hi: भारत का संविधान 26 नवंबर 1949 को अपनाया गया (संविधान दिवस) लेकिन 26 जनवरी 1950 को लागू हुआ (गणतंत्र दिवस)।
explanation_hinglish: Constitution 26 November 1949 ko adopt hua (Constitution Day) lekin 26 January 1950 ko effect mein aaya (Republic Day).
shortcut_formula_note: Adopted: 26 Nov 1949 | Enforced: 26 Jan 1950 | Independence: 15 Aug 1947
common_mistake_note: Students confuse the adoption date (Nov 26) with the enforcement date (Jan 26). Republic Day = enforcement date.
